title: eleocharis indica
intro: Eleocharis indica, also known as Indian pith or threadroot, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis indica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve stress. Herbal preparations of Eleocharis indica can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
